caption: The video captures a live performance by a musician on stage, playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. The performer is dressed in a white shirt with a distinctive red and black patterned vest, and their long hair is tied back. The audience, seated in front of the stage, appears engaged, with some individuals leaning forward to listen more closely. The setting features wooden blinds in the background, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, suggesting the event may be associated with this organization. The overall scene conveys a sense of connection between the performer and the audience, highlighting the live music experience.
